title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Nami as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The South- Western coast of Whole Cake Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come on, let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't help but get excited every time I see this guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Woah! What in the world is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: channel 3!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here it comes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the Shark submerge III!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A sub- marine?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YOHO- HO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To tell you the truth, this is my first time riding this contraption as well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But worry not my friend, because I will safely get us to our destination!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies, Luffy. Though I was the one who initiated the talks about taking on separate as- signments,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems I'll require Brooks assistance in my journey.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should come in good use! After all, inflation is my specialty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: gyaaaaah! Something came out of him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will without a doubt snatch a copy of that poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright brook and Pedro, we're counting on you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After we meet up with Sanji and pudding, we'll just wait around in this general area!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let us all stay on our toes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not forget about the message pekoms left for us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well then, off we go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's just cruise straight along this river...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...until we reach the castle big mom resides in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would it make you feel better if we steered the submarine a bit deeper in the waters than usual?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Alright, we're ashore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're finally on the island big mom lives on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He-yyyy! Sanj!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Puuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu~ DIII-NG!! We're Here As Promii~ Sed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: smells like an adventure to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No. Way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are a tad late, though... are you sure you really saw them, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are a tad late, though... are you sure you really saw them, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm positive! I saw both of them clearly from where I was!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami, check out the ground, it's made of hardened whipped cream!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Deli- Claus!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right! This must be me- ringue! I wonder if this entire island is also made out of sweets.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AAAACK!() I WANT TO MOVE HERE RIGHT NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right around here! I saw Sanji and pudding standing right here,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And when I looked away for one second and looked back, they were just gone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no doubt that we're indeed on the southeastern coast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I know you don't have it in you to lie, Luffy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I have no idea why they would up and vanish as soon as you spotted them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Woah, wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sanji ...!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
